message:
Command `# Synthesis progressing normally (22MB log, 5min elapsed, no deadlock this time)
# Previous run completed synthesis in ~27min total. Estimate ~20min more.
# Monitor every 5 min for up to 4 hours.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 300  # 5 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-90)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL_SIZE" ] && echo "  netlist size: $(numfmt --to=iec $NL_SIZE 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    echo "---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done` executed with exit code -1.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
Command: "# Synthesis progressing normally (22MB log, 5min elapsed, no deadlock this time)
# Previous run completed synthesis in ~27min total. Estimate ~20min more.
# Monitor every 5 min for up to 4 hours.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_wrapper.log"
LR_PID=286668

for i in $(seq 1 48); do
  sleep 300  # 5 min
  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-90)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  NL_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$WRAPPER_RUN/02-yosys-synthesis/"*nl.v 2>/dev/null | head -1)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] poll=$i | LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) | step=$STEP | log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES)"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$NL_SIZE" ] && echo "  netlist size: $(numfmt --to=iec $NL_SIZE 2>/dev/null)"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane DONE ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -30
    echo "---"
    tail -60 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done" timed out
